hero.body: Unscripted portraits of the people of the Emirates — photographed with permission, presence, and patience. Seven years on the pavement, one frame at a time.

gallery.subtitle: A living record of faces, light, and the streets between them.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Four ways to work together — each shaped around the story you want to keep.

items.name: Street Photography Sessions
items.desc: Walk the Emirates with me. Candid, permission-first portraits of real people in real light.

items.name: Portrait Sessions
items.desc: A considered, one-on-one shoot — studio or location — that captures who you actually are.

items.name: Event Coverage
items.desc: Weddings, launches, and gatherings documented with an editorial, unobtrusive eye.

items.name: Brand & Commercial
items.desc: Campaign and product imagery with a human, street-rooted aesthetic for brands that mean it.

steps.title: Choose & Book Online
steps.body: Pick your session type — street, portrait, event, or commercial. Fill in the booking form with your vision, preferred location in the UAE, and a date that works for you. Takes less than 3 minutes.

steps.title: We Meet on Location
steps.body: Zghari meets you at a real UAE street — Al Fahidi, Deira, JBR, or wherever feels right. No studio, no fake backdrops, no artificial lights. Just the streets, the golden-hour light, and your story.

steps.title: Shoot — Natural, Candid, Real
steps.body: Sessions run 1 to 3 hours. Zghari directs minimally — he captures authentic energy, real expressions, and genuine street moments. You won't be told to pose. You won't look like everyone else.

steps.title: Your Gallery, Delivered
steps.body: Within 5 to 7 days, you get a private online gallery of fully edited high-resolution photos. Download them, share them, keep them forever. Print packages available on request.

about.title: Behind the Frame
lines: inside it. I ask first. I wait.
about.quote: I don't take photographs. I'm given them — for the price of a conversation.
about.body: Born between two cities and raised on the pavements of the UAE, I've spent seven years learning that the best portrait is the one you're trusted with. My work lives between documentary honesty and editorial restraint.
about.name: Zghari

items.q: How much does a session cost?
items.a: Sessions start from AED 500 for a street portrait session. Pricing varies based on the session type, duration, and any special requirements. You'll receive a full quote after submitting the booking form — every session is tailored to your vision.

items.q: How long until I receive my photos?
items.a: Your edited gallery is delivered within 5 to 7 business days via a private link. Need them sooner? Rush delivery in 48 hours is available for an additional fee — just mention it when booking.

items.q: What should I wear or prepare?
items.a: Wear something you feel genuinely comfortable in — street photography is about authenticity, not perfection. Avoid very bright or clashing patterns. No need for props or professional wardrobe. Just show up as yourself.

items.q: Can I choose the shooting location?
items.a: Absolutely. You can suggest any location in the UAE that's meaningful to you, or Zghari will recommend the perfect spot based on the vibe you're going for — Old Dubai, Al Fahidi, the Gold Souk, JBR, or beyond.

items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: Booking 3 to 5 days in advance is ideal. For weekends or events, 1 to 2 weeks ahead is recommended. Need something last minute? Drop a message on WhatsApp and we'll see what we can do.

items.q: Can I use the photos commercially?
items.a: Personal use is included in every session. If you plan to use the photos for brand campaigns, ads, or commercial projects, a commercial license is available as an add-on — discussed and agreed before the session begins.

items.q: Do you shoot couples or groups?
items.a: Yes — couples and small groups of up to 4 people are welcome for street portrait sessions. Group sessions are priced based on size and duration. Reach out with your request and we'll put together the right package for you.

items.q: What happens if the weather is bad?
items.a: Sessions can be rescheduled at no cost if outdoor conditions make shooting impractical. Zghari will contact you the day before if the weather looks tricky — no stress, no penalties.
